notes: Pickleheads lists 3 locations totaling 22 courts for Santa Clara (6 + 6 + 10), matching the sum of the three venues below. Both existing baseline entries (Bay Club Santa Clara, Community Recreation Center at Central Park) were found on Pickleheads, so notOnPickleheads is empty. One new venue (Santa Clara Adult Education, lessons-only) was not in the baseline. Two conflicts surfaced: Bay Club's court count (existing 6 vs Pickleheads 10) and Community Recreation Center's stated Open Play hours (Pickleheads' Sat/Sun 8pm–10pm open-play window falls outside the facility's own stated Sat 9am–7:30pm / Sun 9am–7pm operating hours in the baseline) — both left unresolved for human review.

venues.name: Santa Clara Community Recreation Center at Central Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court, permanent lines (shared striping with tennis per city facility info), portable nets
venues.netType: Portable nets on permanent court lines
venues.price: $8/hr resident, $10/hr non-resident (reservation); free during Open Play windows (see hours)
venues.hours: Open Play for Santa Clara City Residents: Mon–Fri 1pm–3pm, Sat–Sun 8pm–10pm (per Pickleheads); reservations available by phone (408-247-0178) or online
venues.weather: Hotter, sunnier — inland Santa Clara summers

conflicts.pickleheads: Open Play for Santa Clara City Residents: Mon–Fri 1pm–3pm, Sat–Sun 8pm–10pm

venues.notes: Court count (6) matches baseline exactly, no conflict there. Pickleheads' stated weekend Open Play window (Sat/Sun 8pm–10pm) falls entirely outside the facility's own stated weekend operating hours in the baseline (Sat 9am–7:30pm, Sun 9am–7pm) — this could be a Pickleheads data error or the baseline being stale; flagged as a conflict rather than guessing which is right. Amenities list and lights=true are new information filled in from Pickleheads that the baseline didn't have. Skill/level info not found in this pass, left 'Not specified' rather than carrying forward baseline's unsourced value.

venues.name: Bay Club - Santa Clara
venues.surface: Outdoor concrete, dedicated courts, permanent lines and nets
venues.price: Membership required (guest membership available); court rental packages from $2,000 (2+ hrs reserved time, equipment, and a coach included)
venues.hours: General club hours: Mon–Fri 6am–10pm, Sat–Sun 7am–8pm; pickleball programmed play: Mon/Wed/Fri 5:30–7:30pm, Sat 10am–1pm
venues.skill: Camps, clinics, and beginner lessons available; social mixers for advanced beginner–intermediate players
venues.weather: Hotter, sunnier — inland Santa Clara summers
venues.notes: Court count conflict: baseline says 6, Pickleheads says 10 outdoor concrete courts — per schema rule Pickleheads' count is used as the authoritative value in the 'courts' field, but both values are preserved in 'conflicts' for human review since this is a meaningful discrepancy, not a rounding difference. Price was 'Not specified' in baseline; Pickleheads and Bay Club's own site fill in membership/rental-package details. General club hours are new; the existing programmed-play hours (Mon/Wed/Fri 5:30–7:30pm, Sat 10am–1pm) match exactly and are not in conflict.

venues.name: Santa Clara Adult Education
venues.surface: Indoor wood court, permanent lines, portable nets
venues.price: One-time fee required to play; lessons only, no open play
venues.skill: Lessons only (Pickleball, Beginning class); no open/drop-in play
venues.notes: New venue, not in baseline. Access is via enrolling in Santa Clara Adult Ed's 'Pickleball, Beginning' class — no open/drop-in play, so bookingUrl points to the class registration page rather than a court-reservation system. No source checked gave a precise geocode for 1840 Benton St, so lat/lon are left null with approxLocation:true per repo convention rather than guessing; likewise no numeric Google Maps cid was confirmed, so googleMapsUrl is null.
